div1.entryFree:
Prognostication, 1) the art of knowing the future: in the hottest day p. proclaims, Wint. IV, 4, 817 (there are almanacs of the poet's time extant with the title: An Almanack and Prognostication made for the year etc.).
2) foretoken, sign: if an oily palm be not a fruitful p. Ant. I, 2, 54.
